research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.
note: Triggers synthesis_route_absent (and would trigger missing_falsifier_ref): cardiac target KCNH2 handoff packet has l1_channel_panel_input = null. For cardiac targets, l1_channel_panel_input is required by the Pathway 1 bridge spec. The absence blocks CRO handoff.
